steps.title: Link subtype to structure
steps.content: Washing machines use the 200 series and furnaces use the 300 series. Both are subtypes of austenitic stainless steel, and the passage says austenitic stainless steel has a face-centered cubic crystalline structure.

steps.title: Reject false comparisons
steps.content: Choice B reverses the nickel relationship: the 300 series has more nickel than the 200 series. Choice C assigns the structure to ferritic steel and denies it to austenitic storage-container steel. Choice D invents matching nitrogen concentrations. The answer is A.
